instructions:
# Long-Short Strategy Backtesting System

## Project Overview
Build a backtesting system for Indian market indices (NIFTY 50, NIFTY BANK, NIFTY IT, NIFTY MIDCAP) with long-short strategies targeting:
- **CAR/MDD > 3** (Calmar Ratio)
- **CAR > 10%** (Compound Annual Return)
- **Win Rate > 60%**

## Target Metrics

| Metric | Target | Description |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| CAR | >10% | Compound Annual Return |
| CAR/MDD | >3 | Calmar Ratio (Return / Max Drawdown) |
| Win Rate | >60% | Percentage of profitable trades |

## Indian Market Indices

| Index | Symbol | Description |
|-------|--------|-------------|
| NIFTY 50 | ^NSEI | Top 50 large-cap stocks |
| NIFTY BANK | ^NSEBANK | Top banking stocks |
| NIFTY IT | ^NSESOF | Top IT stocks |
| NIFTY MIDCAP 100 | ^NSEMDCP100 | Mid-cap stocks |
| NIFTY PHARMA | ^NSEPHARMA | Pharmaceutical stocks |

## Strategy Types

### 1. Momentum-Based Long-Short
**Logic:** Buy strongest performers, short weakest performers
- Lookback period: 3-6 months
- Rebalance: Monthly
- Expected CAR: 12-18%
- Risk: High drawdown in market crashes

### 2. Mean Reversion Long-Short
**Logic:** Price reverts to moving average
- Entry: Price deviates >2 std from 20-day MA
- Exit: Price returns to MA
- Expected CAR: 10-15%
- Risk: Trending markets

### 3. Volatility Long-Short
**Logic:** Long low volatility, short high volatility
- Measure: 20-day rolling volatility
- Expected CAR: 8-12%
- Risk: Volatility clustering

### 4. Pairs Trading
**Logic:** Trade spread between correlated pairs
- Example: NIFTY vs NIFTY BANK
- Entry: Spread deviates from historical mean
- Exit: Spread reverts
- Expected CAR: 10-14%
- Risk: Correlation breakdown

### 5. Trend-Following Long-Short
**Logic:** Long assets above 200-day MA, short below
- Filter: 200-day moving average
- Expected CAR: 10-15%
- Risk: Whipsaw in ranging markets

items.description: Set up historical data feed for Indian indices
steps: Integrate data provider (yfinance, Alpha Vantage, or NSEpy)
Download historical data for NIFTY 50, BANK, IT, MIDCAP
Handle survivorship bias - include delisted stocks
Set up data storage (PostgreSQL or CSV)
Verify data quality and fill gaps

items.description: Build backtesting engine with proper accounting

steps: Calculate N-month momentum for each index
Long top performer, short bottom performer
Add 200-day MA filter to reduce drawdown
Add trend filter (only trade in trend direction)
Long low volatility, short high volatility
Calculate historical mean and std of spread

items.description: Implement metrics calculation (CAR, MDD, Win Rate, Calmar)
Optimize strategy parameters to meet targets
steps: Grid search for momentum lookback period
Grid search for MA periods in trend following
Find parameters that meet CAR>10%, CAR/MDD>3, WinRate>60%
Generate PDF report with all metrics
